title: Shift Change
description: First steps in the industrial world. A horn sounds. Everyone moves.

steps.text: A horn sounded. Half the city walked left. The other half walked right. Nobody bumped.

lines.speaker: Fighter
lines.text: Hard hats. Everyone. Even the pigeons look compliant.

lines.speaker: Rogue
lines.text: There are painted lines on the ground for WALKING. I've never felt so seen and so insulted.

lines.speaker: Cleric
lines.text: The safety board lists 'days since last incident'. Someone has been resetting it out of honesty. I respect that.

lines.speaker: Mage
lines.text: My robes violate at least four posted regulations.

lines.speaker: Bard
lines.text: The horn's a B-flat. Every shift, B-flat. This world has ONE note and it made it load-bearing.
